concept: FAISS similarity search library: flat L2 index API, NumPy dependency, pip install channel.
evidence: FAISS documentation and wiki (github.com/facebookresearch/faiss/wiki) — IndexFlatL2, add, search
FAISS INSTALL.md — faiss-cpu pip package, NumPy requirement
facts: # assembled by the DSCE framework assembler (FAISS)

import numpy as np
import faiss

dimension = 64
index = faiss.IndexFlatL2(dimension)
vectors = np.random.random((100, dimension)).astype('float32')
index.add(vectors)
distances, ids = index.search(vectors[:1], 5)
print(ids)
